name: white_tiger_neuralfur_mixed_release_alignment
reason: The local white tiger processed folder contains cameras/images only, while the available furless mesh is from the NeuralFur official results folder. The complete GaussianHaircut-format directory with projection.npy, furless.obj, neus_lr.obj, scale_035.pickle, tangent, annotation, and eye files is not present locally. The mesh-to-camera transform below is the visually verified white-tiger alignment used for all subsequent projection and visualization.

validation.diagnostic: mask and mesh projection overlay must be checked before white tiger Stage 1 training
